globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://login.microsoftonline.com https://*.microsoftonline.com https://*.azure.com; frame-src https://login.microsoftonline.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
